steps.expected: Test passes: Marshal produces valid NATS config for string field, round-trip parse recovers original value
steps.observed: PASS - Marshal({Name:"nats-server"}) produces config that re-parses to m["name"]=="nats-server"

steps.expected: Test passes: Full Marshal->Unmarshal round-trip preserves all fields including strings
steps.observed: PASS - Complex struct with string fields round-trips via reflect.DeepEqual

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: string field produces valid config text and round-trips
steps.expected: Tests cover: basic string marshaling, quoted output validity, re-parse equality
steps.observed: TestMarshalBasicString tests single string field marshal+parse round-trip. TestMarshalRoundTrip tests multi-field struct including strings with Marshal->Unmarshal->DeepEqual.

assertions.title: String with spaces must be quoted

steps.expected: Test passes: String with spaces is emitted quoted, re-parse yields original
steps.observed: PASS - Marshal({Desc:"hello world"}) produces output containing '"hello world"' (quoted); re-parse yields m["desc"]=="hello world"

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: spaces trigger quoting
steps.expected: Test checks output contains quoted string and round-trips
steps.observed: Test explicitly checks strings.Contains(out, `"hello world"`) for quoting, then re-parses and verifies value equality.

steps.expected: Test passes: All special chars (#, //, {, }, [, ], =, :, \t, \n) round-trip correctly
steps.observed: PASS - Table-driven test with 10 special-char strings all marshal and re-parse to original values

steps.expected: Test passes: String containing double quotes round-trips
steps.observed: PASS - Marshal({Val:`has "quotes" inside`}) produces output that re-parses to the original string with embedded quotes

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: all required special characters covered
steps.expected: Tests cover: #, //, {, }, [, ], =, :, \t, \n, " (double quote). Single quote (') not explicitly in special chars test but double quote escape is tested separately.
steps.observed: TestMarshalStringSpecialChars covers has#hash, has//slash, has{brace, has}close, has[bracket, has]close, has=equals, has:colon, has\ttab, has\nnewline. TestMarshalStringDoubleQuoteEscape covers embedded double quotes. All pass.

steps.expected: Test passes: int, int64, int32, uint16 fields marshal and re-parse as int64 with correct values
steps.observed: PASS - Config{Port:4222, Max:1048576, Min:-100, Size:8080} marshals to config that re-parses with all values as int64 matching originals

steps.expected: Test passes: All integer widths (int8-64, uint8-64) round-trip through Marshal->Unmarshal
steps.observed: PASS - Config with int8 through uint64 fields all round-trip via reflect.DeepEqual

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: integers emitted in NATS config format, re-parse yields int64
steps.expected: Tests verify re-parsed values are int64 type with correct numeric values
steps.observed: TestMarshalInteger explicitly type-asserts m["port"] to int64(4222). TestMarshalInt64Types verifies all widths via DeepEqual after Unmarshal.

steps.expected: Test passes: float64 and float32 fields marshal and re-parse as float64
steps.observed: PASS - Config{Rate:3.14, Ratio:2.5, Precise:0.001} marshals and re-parses with m["rate"]==float64(3.14)

steps.expected: Test passes: Negative float (-22.5) round-trips correctly
steps.observed: PASS - Config{Val:-22.5} marshals and re-parses to m["val"]==float64(-22.5)

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: float values in NATS config format, re-parse yields float64
steps.expected: Tests verify float type and value preservation including negative values
steps.observed: TestMarshalFloat checks m["rate"]==float64(3.14). TestMarshalNegativeFloat checks m["val"]==float64(-22.5). Both confirm float type preserved through marshal/parse cycle.

steps.expected: Test passes: bool fields marshal using true/false literals, re-parse yields correct bool
steps.observed: PASS - Config{Debug:true, Trace:false} marshals with output containing 'true' literal; re-parses to m["debug"]==true, m["trace"]==false

steps.action: Verify test exercises assertion behavior: bool emitted as parser-recognized literals, not quoted strings or integers
steps.expected: Test checks output contains 'true' literal and re-parsed values are bool type
steps.observed: Test explicitly checks strings.Contains(out, "true") for literal output. Re-parse assertions use m["debug"] != true and m["trace"] != false which verify both type (bool) and value.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All basic type marshaling (string, string-with-spaces, string-with-special-chars, integer, float, boolean) produces valid NATS config text that round-trips correctly through parse/unmarshal.
